allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Current dir contents ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force C:\\Games\\MiniApp | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== Python ==="; $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python --version } else { Write-Output "python not found" }; $py3 = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py3\) { Write-Output "py launcher present" } else { Write-Output "py launcher not found" }; Write-Output "=== Git ==="; $g = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($g\) { git --version } else { Write-Output "git not found" })

PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $cmd.Source } else { "no python" }; $cmd2 = Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd2\) { "PY: " + $cmd2.Source } else { "no py" })
Bash(py -3 -c "import ast,sys; [ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\),f\) for f in ['backend/schemas.py','backend/main.py']]; print\('AST_OK'\)")
